news.t: Natural Gas is Wildly Profitable Around the World. In Texas, Prices are Negative.
Global X Launches U.S. Natural Gas ETF Seeking to Capitalize on Liquified Natural Gas Exports

holdings.infoBox: LNGX is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Expand Energy stock at 7.87%, EQT Corporation at 7.68%, Ovintiv at 6.74%, Antero Resources at 4.46%, and Cheniere Energy at 4.27%.

overview.description: The Global X U.S. Natural Gas ETF (LNGX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Global X U.S. Natural Gas index. The fund seeks to track an index of US-listed firms involved in the production, processing, transportation, and storage of natural gas and natural gas liquids. The fund provides targeted exposure to the US natural gas value chain LNGX was launched on Oct 28, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Global X U.S. Natural Gas Index

data.title: Natural Gas is Wildly Profitable Around the World. In Texas, Prices are Negative.
data.text: Producers are having to pay companies to take the natural gas they are producing off their hands.
